jokes.text: Oh, no. The firing tie.
jokes.setup: Hermes announces performance reviews with a twist
jokes.punchline: The 'twist' is revealed to be wearing a specific tie associated with firing people
jokes.explanation: Efficient worldbuilding humor - the idea that there's a specific 'firing tie' is absurd but perfectly fits the bureaucratic world

jokes.text: the lowest-rated employee, possibly Zoidberg, will be fired at sundown. Zoidberg.
jokes.setup: Hermes explains someone will be fired, mentions 'possibly Zoidberg'
jokes.punchline: Immediately confirms it's definitely Zoidberg with deadpan delivery
jokes.explanation: Great character-based humor establishing Zoidberg's status as the obvious scapegoat

jokes.text: Good luck, everybody but Zoidberg.
jokes.setup: Standard 'good luck everyone' send-off
jokes.punchline: Explicitly excludes Zoidberg from the well-wishes
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy and character consistency - doubles down on the Zoidberg targeting

jokes.text: Yes, sir, I will be sure to snore that science lamp right away.
jokes.setup: Amy claims to assist the Professor in important research
jokes.punchline: Her response reveals she's not paying attention and makes no sense
jokes.explanation: Captures Amy's ditzy character well with nonsensical word salad

jokes.text: Not if you stand on their air hose much longer.
jokes.setup: Hermes asks if Fry or Bender could fly the ship instead of Leela
jokes.punchline: Implies Hermes is currently suffocating them
jokes.explanation: Darkly funny misdirection - we expect a defense of her piloting skills but get something more sinister

jokes.text: My job? Toilets 'n' boilers, boilers 'n' toilets. Plus that one boiling toilet.
jokes.setup: Scruffy explains his maintenance duties
jokes.punchline: The escalation to a toilet that's both functions combined
jokes.explanation: Perfect Scruffy line - his laconic delivery paired with absurdist escalation to 'boiling toilet'

jokes.text: Fire me, iffen you dare.
jokes.setup: Standard employee evaluation context
jokes.punchline: Scruffy's defiant challenge using folksy grammar
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Scruffy's confident, folksy character voice

jokes.text: ass ratio ranges from 42% to a mere 11%
jokes.setup: Hermes criticizes employees for doing half-ass jobs
jokes.punchline: He provides specific mathematical percentages for 'ass ratio'
jokes.explanation: Brilliant bureaucratic absurdism - quantifying 'half-ass' work with precise measurements

jokes.text: Hermes Conrad.
jokes.setup: Everyone expects Zoidberg to be fired after all the buildup
jokes.punchline: Hermes reveals he's firing himself
jokes.explanation: Excellent misdirection that subverts all expectations - perfect economy with just his own name

jokes.text: My performance review proves the main drag on our profit is the time I waste on performance reviews.
jokes.setup: Need to explain why Hermes is firing himself
jokes.punchline: Recursive logic - the review process itself is the problem
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-humor about corporate inefficiency - the bureaucrat realizes his own redundancy

jokes.text: They'll be here two seconds ago.
jokes.setup: Hermes mentions notifying central bureaucracy
jokes.punchline: Time paradox of bureaucratic efficiency
jokes.explanation: Classic sci-fi temporal absurdism fitting for Futurama

jokes.text: Only if you buy me dinner first.
jokes.setup: Hermes asks if she's there to tell him to pack it in
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo treating 'pack it in' as romantic invitation
jokes.explanation: Standard sexual innuendo - functional but not particularly clever

jokes.text: I'm Mark 7-G, the machine who's replacing you.
jokes.setup: Professor introduces the replacement
jokes.punchline: Robot literally repeats exactly what was just said about him
jokes.explanation: Simple robot humor - mechanical literal-mindedness

jokes.text: Well, I wouldn't say no to a little friendly debriefing.
jokes.setup: Asked about conducting an exit interview
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo with 'debriefing'
jokes.explanation: Weak pun - predictable innuendo without much cleverness

jokes.text: Sounds like a party.
jokes.setup: Ordered to 'relieve yourself of duty'
jokes.punchline: Hermes treats official termination language as social invitation
jokes.explanation: Mild sarcasm playing on bureaucratic language, decent economy

jokes.text: My friend's ample tuchus is barely out the door, and you're already schmoozing up to his replacement?
jokes.setup: Fry tries to talk to the replacement robot
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's indignant defense using Yiddish terminology
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - Zoidberg showing unexpected loyalty with colorful language

jokes.text: In fact, he hated you more than anyone ever hated anyone.
jokes.setup: Fry tries to explain Hermes didn't like Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Extreme hyperbole about the level of hatred
jokes.explanation: Decent escalation humor with the extreme hatred claim

jokes.text: What, you mean the remarks and the hits? That was just friend teasing.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg hearing that Hermes hated him
jokes.punchline: Reframes abuse as friendly teasing, casually mentions physical violence
jokes.explanation: Dark humor about Zoidberg's desperate need for friendship, casually mentioning violence as affection

jokes.text: He was the only one who cared enough to insult me.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg explaining his relationship with Hermes
jokes.punchline: Reframes constant insults as a form of caring attention
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character insight - pathetically sweet logic that insults are better than being ignored

jokes.text: I insult you, you fat sack.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg lamenting only Hermes insulted him
jokes.punchline: Bender immediately provides an insult to help
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender moment - trying to help in the most inappropriate way possible

jokes.text: Sure, when it's convenient. But Hermes was always there for me.
jokes.setup: Bender offers to insult Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg dismisses it as not being consistent enough, praises Hermes' dedication to hatred
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation of the pathetic logic - Zoidberg has standards for his abuse

jokes.text: On the bright side, I'll never see Zoidberg again.
jokes.setup: Hermes dealing with losing his job
jokes.punchline: Finds silver lining in not having to deal with Zoidberg
jokes.explanation: Consistent with Hermes' character - even in crisis, focuses on avoiding Zoidberg

jokes.text: It better be spicy.
jokes.setup: LaBarbara made his favorite curried goat
jokes.punchline: Even comfort food must meet his exacting standards
jokes.explanation: Sets up character trait that will pay off later - his obsession with spicy food

jokes.text: Not bad. Needs a little hot sauce.
jokes.setup: Hermes is literally on fire from the spicy food
jokes.punchline: Still wants it spicier despite burning
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation - takes the spice obsession to absurd physical comedy level

jokes.text: Then I guess this wouldn't be a good time to tell you that I'm pregnant. What? And you're not the father.
jokes.setup: Hermes worrying about financial difficulties
jokes.punchline: Double revelation - pregnancy then infidelity
jokes.explanation: Good two-part escalation with proper timing between revelations

jokes.text: I'm just joking, husband. See now? Things don't seem so bad anymore, do they?
jokes.setup: Devastating double revelation about pregnancy and infidelity
jokes.punchline: Reveals it was fake crisis to make him feel better by comparison
jokes.explanation: Clever misdirection about perspective and relative problems

jokes.text: Oh, also, I wrecked the car.
jokes.setup: Just made him feel better about their situation
jokes.punchline: Immediately adds real bad news
jokes.explanation: Classic comedic structure - builds up then immediately tears down

jokes.text: This here is a mugging! Hand over your skin.
jokes.setup: Standard mugging setup
jokes.punchline: Instead of money or valuables, demands skin
jokes.explanation: Perfect Roberto line - escalates normal crime to bizarre body horror

jokes.text: Ain't nothing crazy about me but my brain. Right, brain? Right! No, not you, right brain. Right, left brain? Right!
jokes.setup: Roberto defending his sanity
jokes.punchline: Has conversation with his brain hemispheres, getting confused
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Roberto insanity - the contradiction proves itself while showing neurological confusion

jokes.text: I can't! When I fight machinery, machinery always wins!
jokes.setup: LaBarbara tells him to do something about Roberto
jokes.punchline: Hermes admits his weakness against machines
jokes.explanation: Sets up his later character arc about getting mechanical upgrades

jokes.text: That's why you're going straight to the electromagnetic chair.
jokes.setup: Standard arrest/punishment situation
jokes.punchline: Robot version of electric chair - electromagnetic
jokes.explanation: Decent sci-fi wordplay adapting execution methods for robots

jokes.text: And then I'm-a stab it.
jokes.setup: Roberto facing electromagnetic execution
jokes.punchline: Plans to stab the electric chair itself
jokes.explanation: Perfect Roberto - illogical violence even directed at inanimate objects

jokes.text: Stop! It's driving me sane!
jokes.setup: Roberto being executed by electromagnetic chair
jokes.punchline: Claims torture is making him sane instead of killing him
jokes.explanation: Brilliant reversal - for insane Roberto, being made sane would be torture

jokes.text: Nah, I like my victims to know who did it.
jokes.setup: Fry suggests Bender become an executioner with a hood
jokes.punchline: Bender wants credit for his murders
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender ego - even murder is about recognition and credit

jokes.text: Boy, am I indifferent to see you.
jokes.setup: Standard greeting situation
jokes.punchline: Bender's characteristically selfish twist on being glad to see someone
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender line - subverts warm greeting with emotional detachment

jokes.text: Leela punishes me when I don't use enough.
jokes.setup: Fry asked to help with scented body oil
jokes.punchline: Implies disturbing sexual dynamic with punishment
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable TMI moment - functional cringe but not particularly clever

jokes.text: Yuri here runs the most sanitary surgical implant parlor in Filthytown.
jokes.setup: Bender introduces a surgeon
jokes.punchline: Claims 'most sanitary' in a place called 'Filthytown'
jokes.explanation: Good ironic humor. The contradiction between 'sanitary' and 'Filthytown' is economical and effective.

jokes.text: Is that a harpoon in your chest? Yes. And I'm happy to see you.
jokes.setup: Dwight notices obvious harpoon implant
jokes.punchline: Hermes references 'gun in pocket' innuendo structure
jokes.explanation: Decent play on classic innuendo structure adapted for body modification

jokes.text: the whole package fits neatly in the space where my giblets used to be.
jokes.setup: Explaining his harpoon chest implant
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of removed organs ('giblets') like poultry
jokes.explanation: Darkly funny casual reference to organ removal using poultry terminology

jokes.text: I'm kind of a harpoon snob, and let me say, that thing is gorgeous.
jokes.setup: Looking at Hermes' chest harpoon
jokes.punchline: Claims expertise in harpoon aesthetics
jokes.explanation: Absurd specificity - being a 'harpoon snob' in casual conversation

jokes.text: Pitiful and sickening.
jokes.setup: Mark 7-G fails to reach the high shelf
jokes.punchline: Hermes' harsh judgment of the robot's failure
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Hermes' bureaucratic superiority complex

jokes.text: My best wasn't good enough. I'll need my personnel file, please.
jokes.setup: Hermes fails at the task
jokes.punchline: Immediately requests his own personnel file in defeat
jokes.explanation: Good payoff to his overconfidence. The bureaucratic response to failure (filing paperwork) is character-perfect.

jokes.text: Welcome back, old friend. I missed you terribly. You do everything terribly. And I'm not your friend.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg warmly welcomes Hermes back
jokes.punchline: Hermes immediately corrects and insults him
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback to earlier theme about Hermes being the only one who insults Zoidberg

jokes.text: Good old Hermes. When he stops insulting, that's when I worry.
jokes.setup: Hermes just insulted Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg treats insults as sign of health/normalcy
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback reinforcing the twisted relationship dynamic

jokes.text: 'Taint a boiler nor a toilet. Pass.
jokes.setup: Asked to retrieve teeth from disposal
jokes.punchline: Refuses because it doesn't match his strict job description
jokes.explanation: Perfect Scruffy callback to his earlier job description - rigid adherence to boundaries

jokes.text: I don't want to end up a cold, emotionless machine like you.
jokes.setup: Hermes suggests Amy get implants like his
jokes.punchline: Amy calls the enhanced Hermes cold and emotionless
jokes.explanation: Solid observation about Hermes' transformation, sets up character arc

jokes.text: That's sweet, Hermes.
jokes.setup: Just called Hermes cold and emotionless
jokes.punchline: Immediately contradicts herself by calling him sweet
jokes.explanation: Simple contradiction humor - Amy's scattered thought process

jokes.text: How long will it take to install an extendo-arm? I have golf game in half-hour, so half-hour.
jokes.setup: Professor asks about surgery timeline
jokes.punchline: Doctor bases medical procedure time on golf schedule
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist logic. The casual attitude toward major surgery timing based on recreational plans is perfectly absurd.

jokes.text: A machine that can bend? No way.
jokes.setup: Hermes mentions pipe-bending jig accessory
jokes.punchline: Bender acts amazed despite being a bending robot himself
jokes.explanation: Excellent self-referential humor - Bender forgetting/ignoring his own primary function

jokes.text: Such a mild insult. That's not my Hermes.
jokes.setup: Hermes calls Zoidberg a 'spoilsport'
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg notices the insult isn't harsh enough to be authentic
jokes.explanation: Brilliant development of the running gag - Zoidberg knows Hermes' insult patterns so well he detects changes

jokes.text: Then I'll just take them and, throw them away, shall I, why not?
jokes.setup: Hermes mentions his cut-off body parts are rotting
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's obviously false casual offer to 'throw them away'
jokes.explanation: Good setup for later reveal - Zoidberg's transparent deception about his intentions

jokes.text: 'Oh, mon, I'm Hermes, and I think it stinks in here like a green snake, or something else that's Jamaican.'
jokes.setup: Zoidberg using Hermes puppet to ventriloquize
jokes.punchline: Terrible impression with random Jamaican stereotypes
jokes.explanation: Funny bad impression - Zoidberg's incompetent attempt at mimicking Hermes

jokes.text: You know, you look even hotter in infrared.
jokes.setup: Hermes gets Cylon eye implant
jokes.punchline: Uses thermal vision for romantic compliment
jokes.explanation: Decent sci-fi romance pun using the new technology for flirtation

jokes.text: Nice shiny metal ass, Hermes.
jokes.setup: Hermes has gotten robotic rear implant
jokes.punchline: Bender's appreciative comment about the upgrade
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender line - crude but character-appropriate commentary

jokes.text: Not like dum-dum Zoidberg, right, Hermes? Right?
jokes.setup: Hermes talking about having a human brain
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg desperately seeking the usual insult/validation
jokes.explanation: Pathetic moment showing how dependent Zoidberg has become on the abuse

jokes.text: Mecha-Hermes has no interest in such nonsense.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg seeking usual insult interaction
jokes.punchline: Hermes coldly refers to himself in third person, ignores Zoidberg completely
jokes.explanation: Shows his transformation - the third-person reference and complete dismissal of Zoidberg

jokes.text: Of course I tried eating you, but your flesh was too spicy.
jokes.setup: Hermes asks if Zoidberg ate his discarded flesh
jokes.punchline: Casually admits to cannibalistic attempt, connects to spice obsession
jokes.explanation: Dark humor connecting Hermes' spice obsession to cannibalism prevention - brilliantly twisted

jokes.text: 'Yeah, from restaurant to restaurant. Ho-ho, mon.'
jokes.setup: Asked if he's taken up running
jokes.punchline: Fat joke delivered through puppet Hermes
jokes.explanation: Basic fat joke without much cleverness - functional but predictable

jokes.text: 'Looks like you found it again.'
jokes.setup: Puppet asks if Zoidberg lost weight
jokes.punchline: Immediate reversal with found it again
jokes.explanation: Standard setup/reversal joke structure - competent but unoriginal

jokes.text: 'I'm not your friend. I'm out of here the second you let go of my bowels.'
jokes.setup: Zoidberg calling puppet 'old friend'
jokes.punchline: Puppet references being made from Hermes' organs with escape plan
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly dark callback - the puppet maintains Hermes' hostility while acknowledging the body horror situation

jokes.text: I can only see one of his four mouth tendrils moving.
jokes.setup: Watching Zoidberg's ventriloquist act
jokes.punchline: Amy notices Zoidberg's poor ventriloquism technique with alien anatomy detail
jokes.explanation: Good observational humor about Zoidberg's alien anatomy and bad ventriloquism

jokes.text: That meat puppet disgusts me. It's time for the ultimate upgrade.
jokes.setup: Hermes seeing his flesh being used as puppet
jokes.punchline: Decides to get rid of his last human part - his brain
jokes.explanation: Good escalation to the ultimate body modification - sets up climax

jokes.text: Robot brain implant? Never. No one in right mind would do that.
jokes.setup: Hermes wants robot brain implant
jokes.punchline: Professor's phrasing implies you'd need to be crazy, which Hermes now is
jokes.explanation: Good ironic setup - the phrase 'right mind' is key when his mind is the problem

jokes.text: A freshly dug robot grave. Let's exhume-a-zoom-zoom.
jokes.setup: Need to find a robot brain
jokes.punchline: Professor's silly rhyming version of 'exhume'
jokes.explanation: Typical Professor silly wordplay - characteristic but not exceptional

jokes.text: Enjoy eternity without your brain, anonymous dead robot.
jokes.setup: Taking brain from dead robot
jokes.punchline: Casual farewell to grave robbery victim
jokes.explanation: Dark casual humor about grave robbing - fits Professor's amoral scientist character

jokes.text: 'I'm ready to shoot myself if it'll get me off your lap.'
jokes.setup: Asked if ready to watch brain surgery
jokes.punchline: Puppet prefers suicide to current situation
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation humor - puppet's desperation reaches suicidal levels

jokes.text: Any robot brain will improve my fitness as a husband and father.
jokes.setup: LaBarbara worried about unknown brain origin
jokes.punchline: Hermes believes any random robot brain is an upgrade
jokes.explanation: Shows how far gone Hermes is - complete faith in mechanical superiority

jokes.text: But my new robot brain won't.
jokes.setup: LaBarbara says she cares about him too much to lose him
jokes.punchline: Hermes looks forward to not caring about family
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation - he's excited about losing human emotions like love

jokes.text: Oh, I hope to God I'm using that word correctly.
jokes.setup: LaBarbara threatens divorce proceedings
jokes.punchline: Immediately doubts her legal vocabulary
jokes.explanation: Undercuts dramatic moment with linguistic insecurity - good character beat

jokes.text: you might have litigious survivors.
jokes.setup: Professor moved by LaBarbara's plea
jokes.punchline: Reveals he's actually worried about lawsuits, not emotions
jokes.explanation: Perfect Professor moment - appears compassionate but is actually just pragmatic

jokes.text: There will be no noodles until the operation is complete.
jokes.setup: Professor suggests Korean noodle place
jokes.punchline: Hermes prioritizes brain surgery over food
jokes.explanation: Shows his obsessive prioritization - even denies simple pleasures

jokes.text: ♪ I was lonesome for my friend a minute ago / When a happy thought dispelled my woe / And I felt perhaps he'd be a bit less dull / If I sliced up his cyborg skull ♪
jokes.setup: Zoidberg explaining why he's helping with surgery
jokes.punchline: Cheerful song about brain surgery as friendship improvement
jokes.explanation: Brilliant musical number - perfectly captures Zoidberg's twisted logic and cheerful approach to violence

jokes.text: Does anyone else find it freaky that Zoidberg is singing harmony with himself?
jokes.setup: Zoidberg's musical number
jokes.punchline: Amy breaks fourth wall to comment on the impossible vocal arrangement
jokes.explanation: Good meta-joke acknowledging the musical impossibility

jokes.text: My condolences, LaBarbara. I hope you find some comfort in staring at this throbbing mass of nerve tissue.
jokes.setup: Professor offers condolences for Hermes' brain removal
jokes.punchline: Grotesquely specific description of the removed brain
jokes.explanation: Good gross-out humor with Professor's characteristic scientific detachment. The contrast between comfort and grotesque detail works well.

jokes.text: Sweet reawakenin' of me, a Jamaican-in.
jokes.setup: Hermes waking up after brain surgery
jokes.punchline: Forced rhyme combining awakening with Jamaican identity
jokes.explanation: Weak forced rhyme but shows return to human personality

jokes.text: I'm gonna peel off your skin and eat it like pencil shavings.
jokes.setup: Roberto threatening the family
jokes.punchline: Specific and bizarre simile for cannibalism method
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly specific and disturbing threat - the pencil shavings comparison is perfectly unsettling

jokes.text: Thank God Zoidberg didn't reattach my nerves.
jokes.setup: Being skinned alive by Roberto
jokes.punchline: Silver lining that he can't feel the torture due to medical incompetence
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy - Zoidberg's medical incompetence accidentally saves the day

jokes.text: Hermes' skin is so saturated with it that it's dissolving the bad robot.
jokes.setup: Roberto being hurt by eating Hermes' skin
jokes.punchline: The spicy food obsession becomes a defensive mechanism
jokes.explanation: Exceptional payoff to the spice running gag - character trait becomes literal life-saving weapon

jokes.text: In the end, all his implants were no match for my wife's reckless seasoning.
jokes.setup: Hermes reflecting on the resolution
jokes.punchline: Technology defeated by cooking, calls wife's spicing 'reckless'
jokes.explanation: Perfect thematic conclusion - high-tech solutions beaten by simple human elements

jokes.text: Honey, we all do. But fair is fair.
jokes.setup: Hermes says he hates Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: LaBarbara agrees everyone hates him but insists on gratitude anyway
jokes.explanation: Good callback to universal Zoidberg hatred while showing moral principle

jokes.text: Never been friends? Ouch! What a zinger.
jokes.setup: Hermes says they've never been friends
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg appreciates it as a good insult rather than being hurt
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback to the insult-as-affection theme - Zoidberg rates the quality of the burn

jokes.text: You acted like a big jerk. You were selfish and stupid, and you don't deserve a wife like LaBarbara or a friend like me.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg delivering his own 'zinger' back to Hermes
jokes.punchline: Brutal honest assessment while still claiming friendship
jokes.explanation: Good character growth moment - Zoidberg delivers genuine criticism while maintaining his loyalty

jokes.text: It's funny because it's mean.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg's harsh but accurate assessment
jokes.punchline: Hermes analyzes the comedy structure of the insult
jokes.explanation: Meta-commentary on comedy theory - Hermes appreciates the craft of the burn

jokes.text: Thank you, ladies and gentlemen. I'll be here forever.
jokes.setup: Standard comedian closing line
jokes.punchline: Instead of 'all week' says 'forever' - acknowledges permanent show status
jokes.explanation: Meta-joke about the show's enduring nature and character permanence
